modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request to opt out of receiving ticket surveys.

full_description_text:
- During a live phone call, a help desk analyst created a ticket regarding survey notifications.  
- The user expressed a desire to stop receiving feedback requests related to their support tickets.  
- This request pertains specifically to the ticket survey feature within the TeamDynamix environment.
short_description: Request to opt out of receiving ticket surveys.
description:
